brief_html: Sent to accept or decline an invitation to a clan.
format:
(UINT32) Cookie
(UINT32) Clan tag
(STRING) Inviter's username
 (UINT8) Status
remarks_html:
Sent to accept or decline an invitation to a clan.

You must use one of two status values, which are notably Clan Message Codes:

  • 0x04: Decline
  • 0x06: Accept

If you do not reply after about 30 seconds (give or take), the server automatically declines.
